note: HEADLINE: clause 4.2.1 allows 5/month = 60/year; 50/year fits. Today 'per year' is not recognized (period vocabulary is TR-only) and 50 > 5 produces a FALSE CR.
Annualized breach: 70/year > 60/year (5/month cap) — normalization must still flag genuine over-asks.
Matching-period regression guard: 8 > 5 per month must keep firing exactly as today.
Matching-period within-limit regression guard: 4 ≤ 5 per month.

request_text: Generate 8 standard reports for the sales team
note: Request names NO period: the comparison stays direct (8 > 5, today's behavior) — normalization must only run when both periods are known.
Turkish mirror of PQ-01: yearly 50 fits 60/year. Today the period IS recognized (TR vocabulary) and the P2 note fires, but the comparison is period-blind: 50 > 5 → false CR.
Turkish matching-period regression guard: 8 > 5 per month.
ASCII-typed Turkish: 'yilda' is not in today's diacritic-only period vocabulary, so the period is missed and 50 > 5 false-CRs. The vocabulary extension must cover ASCII spellings.
